General.Name: Genmin Ltd
General.Description: Genmin Limited, an exploration and development company, produces iron ores in Africa. Its flagship property comprises 100% owned project, the Baniaka iron ore located in south-east Gabon, west Central Africa. Genmin Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
